hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'generateText|@ai-sdk/anthropic|anthropic\(' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: This command uses the Anthropic API directly (generateText/anthropic SDK). This burns API credits outside your Claude Code subscription. Use the Agent tool instead for all Nova/orchestrator work."}' || echo '{"continue":true}'
